title: 12 Pieces Ice Cream Bowls and Spoons, Plastic Ice Cream Cups, Baseball Cap Ice Creams Cones Resuable Dessert Bowl for ICES Cream, Desserts, Pudding, Fruit (3 Colours)
features: 【High Quality Material】The baseball cap ice cream cones are made of high quality PP material, with delicate craftsmanship, beautiful appearances and vivid colours, which is sturdy and lightweight, suitable for long-term use. Stackable to save space in the cupboard.

【Suitable Size】The kid ice cream bowls of the bowl mouth is 8.5cm/3.5 inch and the height is 6cm/2.4 inch. The spoon is 12cm/4.72 inch long and 4.1cm/1.61 inch wide. The length of the spoon also fits well with the cups, cute enough for family gathering, summer party, and so on.

【Unique Design】The ice cream cone bowl are designed in realistic baseball helmet shape, and the spoons look like ice cream cups. They look beautiful and lively, attracting everyone's attention and bringing joy to your party.

【Easy to clean】These ice cream pots and spoons are easy to stack and take up little space in the kitchen cupboard. Compared to other paper ice cream tub, children's ice cream holder can be reused, environmentally friendly and healthy.

【Wide Applications】The dessert serving bowl is great for ice cream, frozen yoghurt, chocolate, candy, pudding, gelato ice cream and all kinds of desserts, for any party and even for daily use. The reusable dessert bowls offers additional convenience.
